ezra.description: Ezra (Codex 5.4) — engineering consultant, auditor, delivery ops. MCP-delegatable.

spellchecker.description: Spell checking with custom dictionary support. Tools: check_spelling, check_file, check_folder, add_to_dictionary.

github.description: GitHub integration for issues, PRs, commit history, branch management

duckdb.description: Query the phronema graph database (anchor backlinks, pericope index, cross-references)

filesystem.description: Structured filesystem access for canon/, study/, memos/, reports/

memory.description: Persistent knowledge graph — 76 canon books, governing memos, project state. Graph-as-index into memos/.
